name: DiffPalReviewDev
description: Run the development DiffPal review task for Azure DevOps pull requests.
helpMarkDown: Installs DiffPal by default, then runs `diffpal review ado`.
author: DiffPal

inputs.name: install
inputs.label: Install DiffPal
inputs.helpMarkDown: Install @diffpal/diffpal before running the review. Disable this when diffpal is already installed on PATH.

inputs.name: diffpalPath
inputs.label: DiffPal path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path or command name for the diffpal binary. Custom paths skip automatic installation.

inputs.name: base
inputs.label: Base revision
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base revision override. When omitted, the task computes the pull request merge-base from Azure PR context.

inputs.name: head
inputs.label: Head revision
inputs.helpMarkDown: Head revision override. When omitted, the task uses System.PullRequest.SourceCommitId.

inputs.name: blockOn
inputs.label: Block on severity
inputs.helpMarkDown: Severity threshold that marks findings as blocking.

inputs.name: gate
inputs.label: Gate pull request
inputs.helpMarkDown: Return non-zero when blocking findings exist.

inputs.name: explain
inputs.label: Explain resolved context
inputs.helpMarkDown: Print resolved Azure PR context, base/head revisions, merge-base, and redacted CLI arguments before running DiffPal.

inputs.name: debug
inputs.label: Enable DiffPal debug logging
inputs.helpMarkDown: Pass --debug to DiffPal so provider and runtime diagnostics are printed.

inputs.name: feedback
inputs.label: Feedback
inputs.helpMarkDown: Review feedback shape. Summary posts status and one PR summary. Review publishes Azure threads for findings; blocking findings stay active and non-blocking findings are closed immediately.

inputs.name: instructions
inputs.label: Review instructions
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional review instructions for local prompt tuning.
